top_signals.title: US Inflation Accelerates to Three-Year High, Eroding Paychecks
top_signals.summary: US inflation accelerated in May to the fastest pace in more than three years as the Iran war pushed up energy prices, outstripping Americans’ pay gains.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Stocks Fall as US-Iran Tensions Offset CPI Relief: Markets Wrap
top_signals.summary: A relatively tame inflation report brought a degree of relief to Wall Street, but failed to lift stocks amid heightened geopolitical tensions that are keeping energy costs elevated and threatening further price pressures.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Inflation expectations impacting rate path, bonds and global risk assets.

top_signals.title: Policy paper: Introducing the AI Economics Institute
top_signals.summary: Overview of AI Economics Institute, its role in analysing AI’s economic impacts and how it will support evidence-based policy making in the UK.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Lenovo on Strategy and Growth
top_signals.summary: Winston Cheng, Senior Vice President & Chief Financial Officer, Lenovo said the AI infrastructure boom is probably “the greatest infrastructure build in the history of mankind,” when discussing company outlook with Bloomberg’s Sangmi Cha at Bloomberg Invest 2026 in Hong Kong.  (Source: Bloomberg)
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Ripple launches toolkit for agentic payments on XRPL
top_signals.summary: A growing number of companies, including Ripple, want to create payment rails which would AI agents to execute transactions with limited human involvement.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
